---
title: "Research experience"
description-meta: "My research experience among the labs I've worked with"
title-block-banner: false
---

<center>

## [Center for Genomic Sciences](https://www.ccg.unam.mx/en/), UNAM
</center>

<div style="text-align: right;">

> Cuernavaca, Mexico | Dec 2024 - present

</div>

<left>
*Undergraduate researcher*

PI: **Julio A. Freyre-Gonzalez**, [Systems Biology Lab](http://freyrelab.org/en/).

### Causal Discovery in Gene Regulatory Networks

- Investigating causal discovery methods for reconstructing gene regulatory networks from observational transcriptomic data.

- Evaluating graph-based and machine learning approaches, including **additive noise models**, **SCORE**, **diffusion models**, and **transformer-based architectures**.

- Integrating regulatory network resources such as [**Abasy Atlas**](https://abasy.ccg.unam.mx) and the [**Natural Decomposition Approach**](http://freyrelab.org/en/research/natural-decomposition-approach/) for benchmarking and biological interpretation.

### NLP for Transcriptomic Metadata harmonization

- Developing transformer-based NLP pipelines to harmonize RNA-seq and microarray metadata from the **Gene Expression Omnibus ([GEO](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/))**.

- Evaluating large language models for biological metadata normalization using controlled vocabularies and ontology-aware representations.

- Implementing preprocessing, embedding generation, and semantic similarity analyses using **PyTorch**, **Hugging Face Transformers**, and **pandas**.

</left>

<center>

## [International Laboratory for Human Genome Research](https://liigh.unam.mx), UNAM
</center>

<div style="text-align: right;">

> Juriquilla, Mexico | Jan 2025 – May 2026

</div>

<left>
*Undergraduate researcher*

PI: **Maria Avila-Arcos**, [Population & Evolutionary Genomics Lab](https://liigh.unam.mx/mavila/).

- Performed principal component analysis (PCA) and **ADMIXTURE** analyses of ancient and present-day genomic datasets.

- Integrated ancient individuals from *La Conchita* and *Hospital San José de los Naturales* with reference panels from the **1000 Genomes Project** and the **Mexican Biobank (MXB)**.

- Processed genotype and sequencing datasets using **PLINK**, **SAMtools**, **BCFtools**, **EIGENSOFT (smartpca)**, **ADMIXTOOLS**, and **Pong**.

- Generated publication-quality visualizations and contributed to the interpretation of ancestry patterns in colonial-era individuals from **New Spain**.

- Contributed to the population genomics component of the *Ancient Pathogens of New Spain* project.


</left>
